notes: v1.0.11 — Bundles Google Trust Services (R1, R4) + Let's Encrypt ISRG Root X1 in the APK so HTTPS to Cloudflare CDN and Firebase Hosting works on older Android versions whose system trust store predates these roots. Fixes the 'self signed certificate in certificate chain' OTA failure introduced when Firebase/Cloudflare rotated certs to GTS. Carries forward v1.0.9: real-time card scan push (kiosk:card CustomEvent + window.kiosk.on('card', cb)), hidden WebView scrollbars, integration docs at /docs.html. And v1.0.7+ features: native QR via printBytes raster path, self-relaunch after OTA install, Poppins typography, cancellable OTA, HugeIcons, persistent HOME launcher pin, three admin exit actions.
